summary: Recall: 42.9% (24 of 56 reference codes retrieved). Precision: 66.7%. F1: 52.2%. 0 reference codes were incorrectly excluded.

scored_codes.rationale: This is the primary ICD-10 code for COPD and directly matches the query.
Chronic obstructive lung disease is a direct synonym for COPD and a primary instance of the condition.

scored_codes.term: Chronic obstructive pulmonary disease with acute lower respiratory infection
scored_codes.rationale: COPD with acute lower respiratory infection is a clinical variant of COPD with superimposed infection.

scored_codes.term: Chronic obstructive pulmonary disease with acute exacerbation, unspecified
scored_codes.rationale: COPD with acute exacerbation is a clinical variant of COPD representing disease progression.

scored_codes.term: Other specified chronic obstructive pulmonary disease
scored_codes.rationale: Other specified COPD is a clinical variant of COPD.
Unspecified COPD is a clinical variant of COPD.

scored_codes.term: End stage chronic obstructive airways disease (disorder)
scored_codes.rationale: End stage COPD is a severity variant of COPD and represents an instance of the condition.
Chronic obstructive bronchitis is a primary manifestation and subtype of COPD.

scored_codes.term: Very severe chronic obstructive pulmonary disease (disorder)
scored_codes.rationale: Very severe COPD is a severity variant of COPD and represents an instance of the condition.
Mild COPD is a severity variant of COPD and represents an instance of the condition.
Moderate COPD is a severity variant of COPD and represents an instance of the condition.
Severe COPD is a severity variant of COPD and represents an instance of the condition.
Chronic bronchitis is a primary manifestation and subtype of COPD.
Simple and mucopurulent chronic bronchitis is a component condition of COPD and represents chronic airway obstruction.
Simple chronic bronchitis is a subtype of chronic bronchitis, a key component of COPD.
Mucopurulent chronic bronchitis is a subtype of chronic bronchitis, a key component of COPD.

scored_codes.term: Mixed simple and mucopurulent chronic bronchitis
scored_codes.rationale: Mixed simple and mucopurulent chronic bronchitis is a subtype of chronic bronchitis, a key component of COPD.
Unspecified chronic bronchitis is a core component of COPD.
Emphysema of right lung is a primary manifestation and subtype of COPD.
Obstructive emphysema is a primary manifestation and subtype of COPD.

scored_codes.term: Acute exacerbation of chronic obstructive airways disease (disorder)
scored_codes.rationale: Acute exacerbation of COPD is a manifestation of the underlying COPD condition.

scored_codes.term: Chronic obstructive pulmonary disease with acute lower respiratory infection (disorder)
scored_codes.rationale: COPD with acute lower respiratory infection represents an instance of COPD with acute exacerbation.

scored_codes.term: Acute infective exacerbation of chronic obstructive airways disease (disorder)
scored_codes.rationale: Acute infective exacerbation of COPD is a manifestation of the underlying COPD condition.

scored_codes.term: Acute exacerbation of chronic obstructive bronchitis (disorder)
scored_codes.rationale: Acute exacerbation of chronic obstructive bronchitis is a manifestation of COPD.
Acute exacerbation of chronic bronchitis is a manifestation of COPD.
Chronic tracheobronchitis is a primary manifestation and subtype of COPD.
Simple chronic bronchitis is a primary manifestation and subtype of COPD.

scored_codes.term: Acute non-infective exacerbation of chronic obstructive pulmonary disease (disorder)
scored_codes.rationale: This code describes an acute exacerbation of COPD, which is a direct manifestation of the condition and confirms COPD diagnosis.
Pulmonary emphysema is a major pathological component and clinical subtype of COPD, representing a genuine instance of the condition.

scored_codes.term: Chronic obstructive lung disease co-occurrent with acute bronchitis (disorder)
scored_codes.rationale: COPD co-occurrent with acute bronchitis represents an instance of COPD with an acute exacerbation.

scored_codes.term: Asthma-chronic obstructive pulmonary disease overlap syndrome
scored_codes.rationale: Asthma-COPD overlap syndrome is a recognized clinical entity that includes COPD as a component diagnosis.

scored_codes.term: Asthma-chronic obstructive pulmonary disease overlap syndrome (disorder)
scored_codes.rationale: Asthma-COPD overlap syndrome (disorder) is a recognized clinical entity that includes COPD as a component diagnosis.

scored_codes.term: Acute exacerbation of chronic obstructive pulmonary disease with asthma
scored_codes.rationale: Acute exacerbation of COPD with asthma represents an instance of COPD with acute worsening.
Chronic asthmatic bronchitis is a clinical variant that overlaps with COPD phenotypes.

scored_codes.term: Acute exacerbation of chronic asthmatic bronchitis
scored_codes.rationale: Acute exacerbation of chronic asthmatic bronchitis is a manifestation of COPD.
Mucopurulent chronic bronchitis is a clinical subtype/manifestation of COPD and represents a genuine diagnostic instance of the condition.

scored_codes.term: Airway disease due to specific organic dust
scored_codes.rationale: Airway disease due to specific organic dust (occupational lung disease) may overlap with COPD but is a distinct etiology; clinical judgment needed on whether to include occupational variants.

scored_codes.term: HIV disease resulting in lymphoid interstitial pneumonitis
scored_codes.rationale: HIV-related lymphoid interstitial pneumonitis is a complication of HIV, not an instance of COPD.
Chronic pulmonary coccidioidomycosis is a fungal infection, not COPD.
Chronic pulmonary blastomycosis is a fungal infection, not COPD.
Cystic fibrosis is a separate genetic disorder, not COPD, though it may cause chronic lung disease.
Cystic fibrosis with pulmonary manifestations is a distinct genetic condition, not COPD.
Chronic ischaemic heart disease is a cardiovascular condition unrelated to COPD.

scored_codes.term: Pulmonary embolism with mention of acute cor pulmonale
scored_codes.rationale: Pulmonary embolism is an acute vascular event, not COPD.

scored_codes.term: Pulmonary embolism without mention of acute cor pulmonale
scored_codes.rationale: Pulmonary embolism is an acute vascular event, not COPD.
Pulmonary valve disorders are cardiac structural abnormalities, not COPD.
Pulmonary valve stenosis is a cardiac structural abnormality, not COPD.
Chronic rhinitis is an upper airway condition, not COPD.
Chronic sinusitis is an upper airway condition, not COPD.
Chronic laryngotracheitis is an upper airway condition, not COPD.
Rheumatoid lung disease of the hand is a systemic rheumatologic manifestation, not COPD.
Rheumatoid lung disease is a complication of rheumatoid arthritis, not an instance of COPD.
Chronic obstructive pyelonephritis is a renal condition unrelated to COPD.
Chronic kidney disease is an unrelated comorbidity, not an instance of COPD.
Chronic kidney disease stage 1 is an unrelated comorbidity, not an instance of COPD.
Chronic kidney disease stage 2 is an unrelated comorbidity, not an instance of COPD.
Chronic kidney disease stage 3 is an unrelated comorbidity, not an instance of COPD.
Chronic kidney disease stage 5 is an unrelated comorbidity, not an instance of COPD.
Chronic inflammatory disease of uterus is an unrelated gynecological condition, not an instance of COPD.

scored_codes.term: Family history of asthma and other chronic lower respiratory diseases
scored_codes.rationale: Family history of asthma and chronic lower respiratory diseases is a risk factor/screening code, not a diagnosis of COPD itself.

scored_codes.term: Chronic obstructive pulmonary disease monitoring email invitation (procedure)
scored_codes.rationale: This is an administrative/invitation code for COPD monitoring, not a diagnostic confirmation of COPD.

scored_codes.term: Diffuse interstitial rheumatoid disease of lung (disorder)
scored_codes.rationale: Diffuse interstitial rheumatoid disease of lung is a complication of rheumatoid arthritis, not an instance of COPD.

scored_codes.term: Excepted from chronic obstructive pulmonary disease quality indicators - service unavailable (finding)
scored_codes.rationale: This is an administrative exception/exclusion code, not a diagnostic confirmation of COPD.

scored_codes.term: Chronic obstructive pulmonary disease annual review (regime/therapy)
scored_codes.rationale: COPD annual review is an administrative/management code, not a diagnostic confirmation of COPD.
Rheumatoid lung disease is a complication of rheumatoid arthritis, not an instance of COPD.
This code describes asthma exacerbation, not COPD; asthma and COPD are distinct conditions.

scored_codes.term: Acute severe exacerbation of severe persistent asthma
scored_codes.rationale: This code describes acute severe exacerbation of asthma, not COPD; asthma is a separate condition.
This code describes acute severe exacerbation of asthma, not COPD; asthma is a separate condition.

scored_codes.term: Chronic obstructive pulmonary disease monitoring invitation (procedure)
scored_codes.rationale: This is an administrative/invitation code for COPD monitoring, not a diagnostic code confirming COPD itself.

scored_codes.term: Chronic obstructive pulmonary disease monitoring first letter (procedure)
scored_codes.rationale: This is an administrative procedure code for sending a monitoring letter, not a diagnostic code for COPD.

scored_codes.term: Chronic obstructive pulmonary disease monitoring verbal invitation (procedure)
scored_codes.rationale: This is an administrative procedure code for verbal invitation to monitoring, not a diagnostic code for COPD.

scored_codes.term: Excepted from chronic obstructive pulmonary disease quality indicators - informed dissent (finding)
scored_codes.rationale: This is an administrative exception code indicating patient dissent from quality indicators, not a diagnostic code for COPD.

scored_codes.term: Excepted from chronic obstructive pulmonary disease quality indicators - patient unsuitable (finding)
scored_codes.rationale: This is an administrative exception code indicating patient unsuitability for quality indicators, not a diagnostic code for COPD.

scored_codes.term: Chronic obstructive pulmonary disease monitoring telephone invitation (procedure)
scored_codes.rationale: This is an administrative procedure code for telephone invitation to monitoring, not a diagnostic code for COPD.

scored_codes.term: Chronic obstructive pulmonary disease monitoring second letter (procedure)
scored_codes.rationale: This is an administrative procedure code for sending a second monitoring letter, not a diagnostic code for COPD.

scored_codes.term: Chronic obstructive pulmonary disease monitoring third letter (procedure)
scored_codes.rationale: This is an administrative procedure code for sending a third monitoring letter, not a diagnostic code for COPD.

scored_codes.term: Number of chronic obstructive pulmonary disease exacerbations in past year (observable entity)
scored_codes.rationale: This is an observable entity/measurement code for counting exacerbations, not a diagnostic code confirming COPD itself.

scored_codes.term: Chronic obstructive pulmonary disease 3 monthly review (regime/therapy)
scored_codes.rationale: This is an administrative procedure code for COPD review scheduling, not a diagnostic code confirming COPD itself.

scored_codes.term: Chronic obstructive pulmonary disease 6 monthly review (regime/therapy)
scored_codes.rationale: This is an administrative procedure code for COPD review scheduling, not a diagnostic code confirming COPD itself.
This code indicates COPD that has resolved; a resolved condition should be excluded as it no longer represents an active instance of the disease.
Pulmonary heart disease is a cardiovascular complication that may result from COPD but is not COPD itself.
Pulmonary heart disease is a cardiovascular complication, not an instance of COPD.
Interstitial pulmonary diseases are a separate category of chronic lung disease, not COPD.

scored_codes.term: Other interstitial pulmonary diseases with fibrosis
scored_codes.rationale: Interstitial pulmonary disease with fibrosis is a distinct condition, not COPD.
Specified interstitial pulmonary diseases are distinct conditions, not COPD.
Unspecified interstitial pulmonary disease is a distinct category, not COPD.
Interstitial emphysema is a distinct condition, not COPD.
Rheumatoid lung disease is a systemic rheumatologic manifestation, not COPD.
Rheumatoid lung disease is a systemic rheumatologic manifestation, not COPD.

scored_codes.term: Chronic obstructive pulmonary disease patient unsuitable for pulmonary rehabilitation (finding)
scored_codes.rationale: This is a clinical finding/status code indicating unsuitability for rehabilitation, not a diagnostic confirmation of COPD.
Chronic drug-induced interstitial lung disorder is a distinct condition caused by medication, not COPD.
Chronic pulmonary insufficiency following surgery is a post-surgical complication, not COPD.

scored_codes.term: Chronic respiratory disease originating in the perinatal period
scored_codes.rationale: Chronic respiratory disease originating in the perinatal period is a neonatal condition, not primary COPD in adults.

scored_codes.term: Chronic asthma with fixed airflow obstruction
scored_codes.rationale: This code describes chronic asthma with fixed airflow obstruction; while it may overlap clinically with COPD, it is primarily an asthma diagnosis, not COPD.
Chronic respiratory failure is a complication/consequence of COPD, not an instance of COPD itself.
Chronic respiratory failure Type I is a complication of COPD, not an instance of COPD.
Chronic respiratory failure Type II is a complication of COPD, not an instance of COPD.
Chronic respiratory failure unspecified is a complication of COPD, not an instance of COPD.

scored_codes.term: Chronic obstructive asthma co-occurrent with acute exacerbation of asthma
scored_codes.rationale: This code describes asthma with acute exacerbation, not primary COPD; the asthma-COPD overlap is better captured by dedicated overlap codes.
Chronic allergic bronchitis is a distinct condition with allergic etiology, not a primary instance of COPD.
